name: Snap URL Preview Service
description: Snapchat's link-preview fetcher, which scans the HTML of URLs shared in Snapchat chats to build preview cards from Open Graph or Twitter Card tags. Snap documents that responses are cached for 30 minutes to reduce traffic; no IP ranges or robots.txt behavior are documented.

instances: Snap URL Preview Service; bot; snapchat; https://developers.snap.com/robots
